items.name: Flood-Rescue-Coordination-and-Relief-Management-System
items.description: A centralized flood rescue coordination system for managing rescue requests, dispatching teams, tracking relief supplies, and real-time operation monitoring.

items.name: ppt-speaker-notes-generator

items.name: pytest-automation-framework
items.description: This project is a modular automation platform built in Python using Pytest, designed for validating and interacting with Wireless (4G/5G NR) and Satellite Communication systems.The goal is to build a reusable automation core that can integrate with RF instruments, baseband systems, satellite modems, and network nodes.

items.name: NoHack
items.description: NoHack Anti‑Cheat is a complete Windows security suite designed to protect games from tampering, unauthorized tools, and integrity violations. It includes a full set of companion utilities for configuration, integrity generation, log viewing, and profile management. The system installs cleanly into Program Files.

items.name: Windows-xp-portfolio
items.description: A nostalgic Windows XP–inspired personal portfolio built with React (Vite) and Tailwind CSS. This project recreates the classic Windows XP desktop experience while showcasing my projects, skills, and contact information in a creative and interactive way.
